'''ganoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enargia|enargia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enargia|enargia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ganoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæneyeth|gæneyeth]] || [[word:gæneyej|gæneyej]] || [[word:gæneyesh|gæneyesh]] || [[word:gæneye|gæneye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ganonoyoth|ganonoyoth]] || [[word:ganonoyoj|ganonoyoj]] || [[word:ganonoyosh|ganonoyosh]] || [[word:ganonoyo|ganonoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ganoyoth|ganoyoth]] || [[word:ganoyoj|ganoyoj]] || [[word:ganoyosh|ganoyosh]] || [[word:ganoyo|ganoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ganofyoth|ganofyoth]] || [[word:ganofyoj|ganofyoj]] || [[word:ganofyosh|ganofyosh]] || [[word:ganofyof|ganofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ganoyotho|ganoyotho]] || [[word:ganoyojo|ganoyojo]] || [[word:ganoyosho|ganoyosho]] || [[word:ganoyoko|ganoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ganoyoth|ganoyoth]] || [[word:ganoyoj|ganoyoj]] || [[word:ganoyosh|ganoyosh]] || [[word:ganoyo|ganoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ganoyothol|ganoyothol]] || [[word:ganoyojol|ganoyojol]] || [[word:ganoyoshol|ganoyoshol]] || [[word:ganoyokol|ganoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ganoyothotho|ganoyothotho]] || [[word:ganoyojojo|ganoyojojo]] || [[word:ganoyoshosho|ganoyoshosho]] || [[word:ganoyoko|ganoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ganoyothon|ganoyothon]] || [[word:ganoyojon|ganoyojon]] || [[word:ganoyoshon|ganoyoshon]] || [[word:ganoyokon|ganoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ganoyothoro|ganoyothoro]] || [[word:ganoyojoro|ganoyojoro]] || [[word:ganoyoshoro|ganoyoshoro]] || [[word:ganoyokoro|ganoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
